title: Super Mario Bros.
edition_pinned: Row describes the 1985 NES design; genre evidence from archived Wii U Virtual Console product page (data-genre Action), observed 2026-07-13.
moat: One jump-and-run kit turns enemy patterns and pipe routes into precision timing across short levels.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: A tiny verb set and reusable enemy tiles multiply routes without new systems per world.
exemplar_rationale: Foundational side-scrolling execution depth from fixed kit and authored stage geometry.

evidence.claim: Archived Nintendo Wii U Virtual Console product page listed data-genre as: Action.
evidence.platform: Nintendo Store (archived Wii U Virtual Console)
